channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Marley magic: Pittsburg defeats San Ramon Valley in NCS Division I title game behind clutch play from quarterback Marley Alcantara
item.description: NCS Division I football championship: Pittsburg quarterback Marley Alcantara leads Pittsburg to fourth consecutive Division I title with 35-28 win over San Ramon Valley.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor against San Jose State in the Mountain West volleyball championship rather than become the latest team to forfeit to the Spartans.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs recovered a botched snap while the Las Vegas Raiders were within range of a go-ahead field goal with 15 seconds remaining, preserving a 19-17 victory for Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shedeur Sanders wins Unitas award, then goes on to break Colorado's single-season passing mark
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Shedeur Sanders woke up early Friday, won a national award, and then set No. 23 Colorado's all-time single-season passing record.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blake Snell agrees to 5-year deal with Dodgers: reports
item.description: (KRON) -- After one year with the San Francisco Giants, star pitcher Blake Snell left for their biggest rival. Snell agreed to a five-year deal with the Los Angeles Dodgers on Wednesday, according to reports from ESPN, MLB.com and others. Snell is a two-time Cy Young award winner.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: BYU needs some help to reach Big 12 Championship Game
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 9-0 start, it appeared as though BYU was destined for the Big 12 Championship Game. But now, they need some help.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Formula 1 expands grid to add General Motors' Cadillac brand and new American team for 2026 season
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 on Monday at last said it will expand its grid in 2026 to make room for an American team that is partnered with General Motors. “As the pinnacle of motorsports, F1 demands boundary-pushing innovation and excellence.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Short-handed 49ers stomped by Packers in 38-10 road loss
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) -- Josh Jacobs rushed for 106 yards and matched a career high with three touchdowns and the Green Bay Packers trounced the short-handed San Francisco 49ers 38-10 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
